name: vllm_throughput_scan
description: Offline throughput scan across input/output length combinations for baseline performance profiling with 8GB VRAM.
notes: Scan points tuned for 8GB VRAM (RTX 4060 Laptop).
For GPUs with 16GB+, add 2048 input_len scan points.
Each scan point reloads the vLLM engine to ensure clean GPU state.
For prefix cache A/B, set random_prefix_len in the variant env.
